---
title: "Glim - Session Log"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: default
---

**Purpose:** Append-only record of work done in each Claude session. New entries go at the top (reverse chronological), immediately after the `# Active Session Log` header. Claude Code prepends entries at session end via the flush procedure in the handoff file.

**When to read this file:** When catching up on recent implementation work, reviewing what changed, or looking for detailed test results and bug fix context. Claude Code reads only the first ~20 lines when appending a new entry.

**File rotation:** When this file grows large, start a new file with a date or phase suffix (e.g., `glim_session_log_phase2.Rmd`). Do not delete old session log files.

---

### Entry Template

> ### [DATE] ([Claude Code / Claude.ai])
> - [What was done]
> - [Key outputs generated with file paths]
> - [Tests run and outcomes]
> - [Decisions made - flag for promotion to Project Documentation Decision Register if significant]
> - [Issues encountered or flagged]

---

# Active Session Log

### 2026-04-04 (Claude Code) - Nutrition tracker implementation

- **Created `client/src/stores/useNutritionStore.js`:** localStorage key `glim-nutrition`. Persists: `logs[]`, `goals{ protein/fiber/fruit/veggie: {min, ideal} }`, `configUpdatedAt`. Default goals: protein 80/100g, fiber 25/35g, fruit 2/3 srv, veggie 3/5 srv. Actions: `logFromLibrary`, `logRaw`, `undoLast` (soft-delete with `deletedAt`), `setGoal`, `reload`. Selectors: `getToday` (sums today, clamps to 0), `getProgress` (per-nutrient `{current, min, ideal, minMet, idealMet}`), `getStreak`, `getAllStreak`, `getWeeklyAvg`. Uses `fruitServings`/`vegServings` as log field names mapping to `fruit`/`veggie` in progress/goals.
- **Created `client/src/stores/useNutritionLibraryStore.js`:** localStorage key `glim-nutrition-library`. Item shape: `{id, name, protein, fiber, fruitServings, vegServings, unit, hidden, usageCount, lastUsed, createdAt, deletedAt}`. Actions: `addItem`, `editItem`, `deleteItem` (soft), `recordUsage`, `reload`. Selectors: `getVisibleItems(searchQuery?)` sorted by usageCount desc, `getItemById`.
- **Created `client/src/components/MoreMenu.jsx`:** Slide-up overlay (z-index 45) with scrim (z-index 44). 3-column grid, "tracking" and "tools" section labels. Available items: nutrition (mobile only, via `isMobile` check), settings (all). Dimmed: focus, exercise, mood, sleep, journal, dashboard, trends. `openFeature(panelName)` closes menu then opens panel with 150ms delay. Slide-up animation: `translateY(100%) -> translateY(0)` over 280ms.
- **Created `client/src/components/NutritionPanel.jsx`:** Full rewrite with 200-message pool across 8 event types (`nutrition_logged`, `nutrition_min_met`, `nutrition_ideal_met`, `nutrition_all_mins`, `nutrition_streak`, `nutrition_nudge`, `nutrition_streak_broken`, `nutrition_first_log`). NUTRIENTS config maps `key` (progress) to `logKey` (logRaw field), label, unit, brightColor, dimColor, gradStart. `selectLoggedMsg(vars)`: 80% context pool (library vs raw), 20% splash from 7 other pools. `interpolate(template, vars)`: replaces `{variable}` placeholders. `triggerNutritionEvents(logVars, prevProg, nextProg, isFirstLog)`: captures before/after progress (Zustand set is synchronous), fires immediate logged message + delayed celebrates/milestones at 3500ms and 7000ms. All timers use refs (`undoTimerRef`, `delayedTimersRef`) with cleanup. Sub-components: `NutrientBar` (two-tone two-div fill), `InlineInputRow`, `LibraryItemRow`. Layout: header -> 4 pinned bars -> divider -> undo toast -> scrollable library -> streak footer. Panel manages its own scroll split (CompanionPanel sets `overflowY: hidden` for nutrition).
- **Modified `client/src/components/NavBar.jsx`:** Added `NutritionIcon` (apple with medium lobes + 45-degree ellipse leaf, Icon I spec). Desktop (6 items): home, water, steps, tasks, nutrition, more. Mobile (5 items): home, water, steps, tasks, more. `handleTap` for 'more' calls `setShowMoreMenu(true)`.
- **Modified `client/src/stores/useUIStore.js`:** Added `showMoreMenu: false` and `setShowMoreMenu` action.
- **Modified `client/src/DesktopPet.jsx`:** Added `import MoreMenu` and `<MoreMenu />` in render alongside `<CompanionPanel />`.
- **Modified `client/src/components/CompanionPanel.jsx`:** Routes `activePanel === 'nutrition'` to `<NutritionPanel />`. Sets `overflowY: 'hidden'` for nutrition so NutritionPanel manages its own scroll split.
- **Modified `client/src/stores/index.js`:** Added barrel exports for `useNutritionStore` and `useNutritionLibraryStore`.
- **Tests:** ESLint clean on all new files. 47 unit tests run via `/tmp/nutrition_test.mjs` (pure store logic: getTodayTotals, getProgress flags, computeStreak, computeAllStreak, computeWeeklyAvg, undoLast, getDailyTotals clamping, logFromLibrary math, getVisibleItems sort). All 47 passed.
- **Build check:** 721KB JS / 223KB gzip (up from ~701KB/217KB - +20KB from message pools). Clean build, no new warnings.
- **Issues:** Pre-existing ESLint warning in DesktopPet.jsx on `Date.now` (impure); not introduced this session. IDE diagnostic "'MoreMenu' declared but never read" fixed immediately by adding `<MoreMenu />` to JSX.
- **Decisions:** Soft-delete for nutrition (vs water's hard-delete) to avoid corrupting multi-nutrient entry counters. Cross-store orchestration via panel (stores never import each other). NutritionPanel embeds message pools directly as stopgap (same pattern as WaterPanel) until reaction system is built.
